ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jonathan Madison appeared in person for and with Perry Brown II (administrator).
Jessie Arterbury and Judy Bernal appeared in person to assist Mr. Brown.

Mr. Madison apologies to the Court. Order to appear/ Order show cause is taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Maloney: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Continued To Sep-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Perry Brown II and Jonathan Madison to appear on September 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. And an order to show cause issued to Jonathan Madison as to why sanctions per CCP 128 in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
